title: GEEPAS Dry Iron | Clothes Lightweight Electric Press | 32s Heat up Non-Stick Soleplate Adjustable Temperature | Overheat Protection Ergonomic Handle with Indicator Light | 2 Year Warranty 1200W White
features: ✅ LIGHTWEIGHT & EASY TO USE – Designed for effortless ironing, this 0.55kg flat iron press is easy to handle, making it ideal for everyday use on all fabric types.
✅ NON-STICK SOLEPLATE – The high-quality non-stick coating ensures the portable iron press machine glides smoothly over fabrics, preventing sticking, snagging, or fabric burns.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE CONTROL, FABRIC GUIDE & INDICATOR LIGHT – Easily customize the heat with the thermostat control dial, suitable for cotton, wool, silk, linen, and synthetics. The indicator light notifies when electric iron reaches the set temperature.
✅ SAFE & RELIABLE WITH OVERHEAT PROTECTION – Built-in overheat protection automatically shuts off power to prevent fabric damage. The ergonomic, heat-resistant handle ensures comfortable pressing.
✅ COMPACT, EASY STORAGE & CORD WRAP – The cord wrap feature of the lightweight iron helps keep storage tidy, and the stable heel rest allows the clothes iron to stand upright when not in use.
description: Product Description Geepas 1200W Dry Iron for Perfectly Crisp Ironed Clothes Hey, Get me in, Get Wrinkles Out! Geepas Dry Iron is a quick solution to make this hectic daily task seem fun. It has the appropriate weight needed for ironing the clothes. It is not too heavy and does not numb your arms. Nor is it too lightweight to make you put all the effort. The thermostat controller is located between the handle and the base. It is a rotating control. You can adjust it to the type of clothing you're ironing. After proper adjustment to the type of fabric, you can remove all the creases effortlessly. POWERFUL 1200W, NON-STICK COATING PLATE Super smooth Non-Stick Coating and 1200W power for an extra glide & a beautiful crease free finish for effortless ironing across all fabrics. It is lightweight as compared to other Irons. ADJUSTABLE THERMOSTAT CONTROL & INDICATOR LIGHT You can easily set the thermostat to the required temperature, and the LED light tells you when the iron is set at the necessary temperature.
